subtitle: Lines for the in-between
title: Isabelle

hero.title: You've found a quiet place.
hero.text:
I'm **Isabelle**.
I write poems, sometimes spiritual, sometimes not about the things that linger.
About faith, doubt, longing, and ordinary days.

You can find more of my words on [Instagram](https://instagram.com/) or follow me on [Twitter/X](https://twitter.com/).

description: Mere Words is a quiet collection of poems and reflections on faith, longing, doubt, and the slow work of becoming. These are not polished answers, only honest words.
